text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
At long last, we've arrived at the legendary ramen
shop!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're going to create the best ramen shop in
Japan, and to do that... we've gotta steal their
flavors!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, we're ordering everything on the menu!
Follow my lead, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Don't chicken out now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wait a second... Maybe focusing all our energies only on the house special is our best shot...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Of course! The house special is the very
manifestation of the ramen chef's heart and soul!
Why bother with the rest?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, Chef! What's your top recommendation
here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship savors her bowl of legendary golden
broth and thin, springy noodles. She's taken a
major first step on the path to ramen mastery.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aww, yeah! Let's start from the top!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But our struggle wasn't for nothing. I can see our
path to victory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Take my hand! We'll conquer every challenge on
the long, rugged road to ramen mastery!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship smiles defiantly as the crimson sun
glimmers at her back.
